response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Perfect alignment with the audio phonetics and visual texts for both songs performed ('Non-breath oblige' and 'ray').
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the lyrics reference for both songs and supplemented the MC segments with precise manual transcription and translation, as the reference JSON only contained song descriptions.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed carefully to track continuous fast repetition in 'Non-breath oblige' and synchronized the MC segments precisely with the speaker's vocal cues and pauses.

subtitles.original: 息を止めることを
subtitles.english: To hold my breath...

subtitles.original: 強制する
subtitles.english: ...is forced upon me.

subtitles.original: 息が詰まる 息が詰まる 息が詰まる 息が詰まる
subtitles.english: It's suffocating, it's suffocating, it's suffocating...

subtitles.original: 息が詰まる 息が詰まる 息が詰まる 息が詰まる
subtitles.english: It's suffocating, it's suffocating, it's suffocating...

subtitles.original: 息が詰まる 息が詰まる 息が詰まる 息が詰まる
subtitles.english: It's suffocating, it's suffocating, it's suffocating...

subtitles.original: 息が詰まる 息が詰まる 息が詰まる
subtitles.english: It's suffocating, it's suffocating, it's suffocating...

subtitles.original: 息を止める 息を止める 息を止める 息を止める
subtitles.english: Hold your breath, hold your breath, hold your breath...

subtitles.original: 息を止める 息を止める 息を止める 息を止める
subtitles.english: Hold your breath, hold your breath, hold your breath...

subtitles.original: 息を止める 息を止める 息を止める 息を止める
subtitles.english: Hold your breath, hold your breath, hold your breath...

subtitles.original: 息を止める 息を止める 息を止める 息を止める
subtitles.english: Hold your breath, hold your breath, hold your breath...

subtitles.original: ノンブレス ノンブレス ノンブレス ノンブレス・オブリージュ
subtitles.english: Non-breath, non-breath, non-breath, Non-breath oblige!

subtitles.original: I love you
subtitles.english: I love you.

subtitles.original: それぞれの好きを守るため
subtitles.english: To protect each of our own loves,

subtitles.original: 君と防空壕で呼吸する保存
subtitles.english: I breathe in a bomb shelter with you.

subtitles.original: 酸素が足りない...
subtitles.english: I don't have enough oxygen...

subtitles.original: 酸素が足りない...
subtitles.english: I don't have enough oxygen...

subtitles.original: 酸素が足りないんですけど...
subtitles.english: I don't have enough oxygen, but...

subtitles.original: はい、はぁ...
subtitles.english: Yeah... phew...

subtitles.original: 続けてやらせていただきました！
subtitles.english: I went ahead and performed them back-to-back!

subtitles.original: はい！いかがでしたでしょうか？
subtitles.english: Yeah! How did you like them?

subtitles.original: 昨日の配信でも話したんですけど、
subtitles.english: I also talked about this in yesterday's stream...

subtitles.original: あの、一部人間じゃないやつがあるって言ってたのが、
subtitles.english: that there is one part that isn't meant for humans to sing...

subtitles.original: この「ノンブレス・オブリージュ」と、
subtitles.english: and that was 'Non-breath oblige'...

subtitles.original: 先ほどね、ソロでやらせていただいた「毒チョコねえと一期一会物語」でした！
subtitles.english: and 'Dokuchoko neeto Ichigoichie Monogatari' that I performed solo earlier!

subtitles.original: はい！ちょっと、純粋に凄く心配だったんですけど、
subtitles.english: Yes! Honestly, I was really worried...

subtitles.original: なんとかね、できて良かったという、今はすごい...
subtitles.english: but I'm so glad I somehow managed to pull it off...

subtitles.original: 安心で今、震えております。
subtitles.english: Now, I'm literally shaking with relief.

subtitles.original: はい！というわけでここまでたくさん見ていただきましたが、
subtitles.english: Yes! So, you've watched quite a lot of performances so far...

subtitles.original: 皆さん、いかがですか？
subtitles.english: everyone, how do you like it?

subtitles.original: ゲストもね、めっちゃ来てもらって、
subtitles.english: We had so many amazing guests come on,

subtitles.original: AZKiちゃんと、あと、みお先輩、フレア先輩、ポルカ先輩、ねね先輩も！
subtitles.english: AZKi-chan, Mio-senpai, Flare-senpai, Polka-senpai, and Nene-senpai!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 本当にね、みんなと歌ってみたい曲を、自分が好きなやつを、
subtitles.english: Really, for each song, I chose the ones I wanted to sing with them, the ones I love...

subtitles.original: 「この人にこれを歌ってるとこ聞きたい」っていう気持ちで選んで、一緒にやらせていただきました。
subtitles.english: with the feeling of "I want to hear this person sing this song," and we got to perform them together!

subtitles.original: 本当にありがとうございます！先輩たちありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much! Thank you, senpais!

subtitles.original: はぁ、ちょっと、一回水飲んでいいか？水を飲ませてくれ！
subtitles.english: Phew... can I drink some water? Let me drink some water!

subtitles.original: よいしょ、はい。
subtitles.english: There we go. Okay.

subtitles.original: はい、ちょっと落ち着きました。
subtitles.english: Alright, I've calmed down a bit.

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、まだまだ続くんでね、次の曲に行きたいと思うんですけど、
subtitles.english: Alright! So, we still have more to go, so I'd like to move on to the next song...

subtitles.original: 次の曲は、あの、昨日のトークでもめっちゃリクエストが上がってて、
subtitles.english: For the next song, there were so many requests during yesterday's talk...

subtitles.original: その前からずっとリクエストが上がってて、
subtitles.english: and even before that, I've been constantly getting requests for it.

subtitles.original: 「あ、これ生誕ライブにやりたいな」ってことで、ずっと取っておいた曲です。
subtitles.english: "Ah, I want to do this for my birthday live," so I saved this song for today.

subtitles.original: なんで、楽しんでもらえると嬉しいです！それでは、次の曲聞いてください。
subtitles.english: So, I hope you enjoy it! Now, please listen to the next song...

subtitles.original: 「ray」
subtitles.english: "ray".

subtitles.original: お別れしたのはもっと 前の事だったような
subtitles.english: It feels like we parted ways much longer ago than we did.

subtitles.original: 悲しい光は封じ込めて 踵すり減らしたんだ
subtitles.english: I locked away that sorrowful light and wore down my heels.

subtitles.original: 君といた時は見えた
subtitles.english: I could see it when I was with you.

subtitles.original: 今は見えなくなった
subtitles.english: But now, it's out of sight.

subtitles.original: 透明な彗星をぼんやりと でもそれだけ探している
subtitles.english: I'm vaguely searching for that transparent comet, yet that's all I look for.

subtitles.original: しょっちゅう唄を歌ったよ
subtitles.english: I sang songs all the time.

subtitles.original: その時だけのメロディーを
subtitles.english: Melodies meant only for those moments.

subtitles.original: 寂しくなんかなかったよ
subtitles.english: I wasn't lonely at all.

subtitles.original: ちゃんと寂しくなれたから
subtitles.english: Because I was able to properly feel lonely.

subtitles.original: いつまでどこまでなんて
subtitles.english: Wondering how far and for how long...

subtitles.original: 正常か異常かなんて
subtitles.english: ...or whether things are normal or abnormal.

subtitles.original: 考える暇も無い程 歩くのは大変だ
subtitles.english: It's so hard to walk, with no time to even think about it.

subtitles.original: 楽しい方がずっといいよ
subtitles.english: It's much better to have fun.

subtitles.original: ごまかして笑っていくよ
subtitles.english: I'll keep hiding my pain with a smile.

subtitles.original: 大丈夫だ あの痛みは
subtitles.english: It's okay, that pain...

subtitles.original: 忘れたって消えやしない
subtitles.english: ...won't fade away, even if I forget it.

subtitles.original: 理想で作った道を
subtitles.english: The road paved with my ideals...

subtitles.original: 現実が塗り替えていくよ
subtitles.english: ...reality continues to paint over.

subtitles.original: 思い出はその軌跡の上で 輝きになって残っている
subtitles.english: On top of that path, those memories remain as a radiant shine.

subtitles.original: お別れしたのは何で
subtitles.english: Why did we part ways?

subtitles.original: 何のためだったんだろうな
subtitles.english: What on earth was it all for?

subtitles.original: 悲しい光が
subtitles.english: The sorrowful light...
